title: Ios island views in Greece July 2 2010

transcript.text: So here are the Greek islands. Here's Athens. These are the Greek islands right here. So I'm on Eos right now, which is this one right here, Eos. Santorini, I think the most famous because it's the volcanic one, hot springs and stuff is right here, just south of Eos.

And then you have Cyknos, which is right here. This is north. Do you see more hills? It's a few miles wide or something from the village. This way. There's that little island, Cyknos, which I just pointed to. It's a little guy. And then Santorini, you can see from here. At least I can see it. I was looking at it the other day, actually. You can see, probably you can see it at night, but you can see the buildings on it.
We're in like mid-day, mid-haze. It's like 2.30 now. So I don't know if it'll show up on the video camera, but I can see it off there in the distance.
So I'm going to go down to the new beach now. Lounge for a little bit, a couple hours. I'm going to take the boat out of here. There's an example of a boat.
There's a passenger ferry. The fast one. It does look like a boat. Here's an example of the road. It's just barren islands. No, no. Trees on them, just a bunch of goats.
Here's my path that I was walking down along this. Here's where my bike is.
Okay, there's the town. There's the top of the hill. There's the town where we partied. We took off. Landed. Interesting. Old vessel right there. Cool beach there.
This is on another boat. The other boat. Did it in four hours. This boat's going to do it in eight. This boat's not nearly as fast.
It's like twice as slow. But it's still going pretty fast. I guess it's not direct though. We're going to other. It feels pretty much as fast.
We're going to other islands though. You can see the sunset on the ocean. The hills. One of those walls.
There's Santorini. You can see it on the camera. I can see it. You can see the buildings and everything on it.
You can get some boats. Daddy boat and baby boat. So here we're coming up on the beach where I was staying at.
I think we're going to see it. That's the hill that I wanted to climb.
I couldn't really get to it. I got to maybe there. The trail I was taking would have taken to that building over there.
There would have been a hike to get up to the top of that hill.
Probably would have seen the other side of it though.
Okay, so the beach, the new beach I was hanging out at was right over in there.
And then the beach I was camping at was right around there in here.
So, here we are. There it is.
Far out camping.
Oh, and there's the town.
Look through each other. There's the fast boat.
It's going to be too fast. It's going to the swat that it creates.
It's pretty intense to look at.
I mean, it's way bigger than this.
This is nothing compared to what this thing creates.
It's going to be just creates this insane snack sauce.
You can't see it in the camera.
I can see it perfectly though in my eye.
Wow, now we're going into the ocean.
It's wild.
Let's see the haze of the sunset.
Oh yeah, I'll get the sunset.
Here we are. Here's the next island.
Oh, that was another island.
Island Naxos, which is like literally right over there.
So, these islands are all over the place here.
And there's, uh, here's this.
Party town.
